title: "Review Diff, Reimagined"

# Review Diff, Reimagined

A real review workflow: a file sidebar grouped by directory, a true side-by-side OLD/NEW view, and comments anywhere — collected in a dedicated panel. (Plus Review Stash and a watch mode that auto-reloads on save.)
